# Skills Catalog

This folder contains executable Copilot skills in the required format:

- `.github/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`

## Available Skills

- `backend-api-execution` for Express, MongoDB, API contracts, validation, and error handling.
- `frontend-dashboard-delivery` for Next.js App Router UI, data fetching, and Tailwind UX.
- `python-fingerprinting-crawling` for Python workers, image fingerprinting, and crawler reliability.
- `infra-deployment-guardrails` for Docker, Cloud Run, CI/CD, and safe environment configuration.
- `docs-sync-governance` for PLAN/ROADMAP synchronization and milestone reporting hygiene.

## Notes

- The legacy monolithic `SKILL.md` file has been replaced by modular skill folders for proper auto-discovery.
- Keep each skill focused and keyword-rich so Copilot can auto-select it when relevant.
